The '''''Dominator''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], this ship was responsible for destroying an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] training base on [[Taul/Legends|Taul]].

Sometime before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the ''Dominator'' was refitted with the latest in [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] systems and more powerful thrusters, and was engineered to support forces combating Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. The rebuild was extensive enough that she was described as being an "overhauled ''Victory''-class hull."

{{Ship-stub}}
